text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
With my flawless victory, I have<n>ended the Golden
Generation. Now<n>begins the era of the Centurial
Overlord dynasty! The ruler of which<n>is... me, of
course!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Captain of Knights, Doto! Castle<n>Neighbor, Ayabe!
And the one<n>destined to be my twin sun—Trainer!
The crowd is exuberant over thedawning of this new, grand age! Thusconcludes Origins of the CenturialOverlord... But my legend yetcontinues.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Yes! The story of the Centurial<n>Overlord has only
just begun!
